name: WireGuard for Windows MSI
verification_method: Downloaded from the official WireGuard Windows client index and hashed locally with SHA256.
notes: Use the MSI as one embedded asset inside the V1 self-extracting installer so user installation does not need a live download.
The self-extracting installer also embeds a per-device WireGuard INI generated by the builder.
Do not use wireguard-installer.exe as the embedded asset for V1 because the official index describes it as a downloader/verifier for the MSI files.
